meta.title: StrategyLab | Websites & Ad Funnels Built to Bring Your Business More Leads
meta.description: StrategyLab helps growing businesses get more leads, inquiries, and sales through high-converting websites, landing pages, and ads management. Book a free consultation or chat on WhatsApp.

common.currency_note: Amounts in your selected currency are indicative (approximate exchange vs. GHS). Final quotes may be in GHS or as agreed.

sticky.text: Get more leads. Book a free consultation or chat now.

hero.title_html: Websites and Ad Funnels Built to Bring Your Business More Leads
hero.desc: StrategyLab helps growing businesses turn attention into inquiries, bookings, and sales through high-converting websites, landing pages, and ads management.
hero.trust: Trusted by gyms, schools, restaurants, and local businesses.

pain.desc: Outdated sites, unclear next steps, and scattered efforts keep you from turning visitors into customers.
pain.li1_html: Outdated or weak website — Visitors leave instead of inquiring or booking.
pain.li2_html: No clear call to action — Traffic comes in but nothing converts.
pain.li3_html: Too much dependence on Instagram alone — You need a home for your brand and a way to capture leads.
pain.li4_html: Poor lead capture — Interested people slip away because forms are buried or confusing.
pain.li5_html: Wasted ad spend — Ads send traffic to pages that don’t convert.
pain.li6_html: Low conversion from traffic — Clicks don’t turn into inquiries, calls, or bookings.

solution.desc: We’re not just designers. We’re a growth-focused digital partner that builds conversion-ready online systems for local and regional businesses.
solution.text: Gyms, schools, training centers, event brands, restaurants, clinics, salons, real estate, and other SMEs get stronger online presence and better lead generation — through modern websites, landing pages, and ads management built for real business goals.

services.desc: Four core services built for leads, inquiries, and growth.
services.c1p: Professional, mobile-first websites that build trust and capture leads. Clear positioning, fast load, and clear calls to action so visitors become inquiries and bookings.
services.c1o: More inquiries · Better trust · Stronger positioning
services.c2p: Single-goal pages for campaigns, launches, or ad traffic. Optimized for conversion so every visitor has one clear next step — sign up, book, or inquire.
services.c2o: Higher lead conversion · Clear follow-up · Less wasted traffic
services.c3p: Meta and Google Ads set up and run for your goals. Targeting, creative tests, and landing pages aligned so ad spend drives inquiries, calls, and sales — not just clicks.
services.c3o: Better ROI · Qualified leads · Less wasted spend
services.c4p: Full system: conversion-ready website plus ads management. One partner for your online presence and lead flow — from first touch to inquiry and beyond.
services.c4o: End-to-end growth · Consistent messaging · Easier scaling

portfolio.desc: Websites and campaigns we’ve built for events, food, photo booths, and community brands — all focused on leads and conversion.
portfolio.k1_aria: Preview Kaizen Nights — Movie Night Events
portfolio.k1p: Movie night events: waitlist, FIFA competition, secret screenings, after party — the ultimate experience.
portfolio.e1_aria: Preview EAT ME — Satisfy Your Cravings
portfolio.e1p: Food so good it's sinful. Weekly menu, catering, cocktails — order and get a taste.
portfolio.b1_aria: Preview Booths & Beyond — Magazine-Style Photo Booths
portfolio.b1p: Magazine-style photo booths. Custom backdrops, VOGUE-style frames, unforgettable moments.
portfolio.o1_aria: Preview One Man Thousand — The Strongmen Gathering
portfolio.o1p: The strongmen gathering. Brotherhood, mental health, physical wellness, spiritual growth.
portfolio.t1_aria: Preview TMTODDS — Football Betting Slips Ghana
portfolio.t1p: Ghana football betting slips: daily board, VIP tiers, proof ledger, and GHS pricing — built for local bettors.
portfolio.v1_aria: Preview TMT Votes — Live Public Voting
portfolio.v1p: Public voting without accounts: pick a topic, vote by email or phone, and see live results update instantly.

why.desc: We focus on leads and conversion, not just visuals. Here’s what sets us apart from generic freelancers or template providers.
why.li1_html: Leads-first approach — Every decision is geared toward inquiries, bookings, and sales.
why.li2_html: Modern, professional execution — Websites and funnels that look credible and work on every device.
why.li3_html: Built for real business goals — Not one-size-fits-all; we align with your audience and offer.
why.li4_html: Ads and funnel thinking included — We think about where traffic comes from and how it converts.
why.li5_html: Clear communication, simple process — No jargon overload; you stay in the loop from start to launch.
why.li6_html: Right fit for local, growth-focused businesses — Gyms, schools, clinics, restaurants, events, and SMEs that want to grow.

process.desc: A simple, low-friction process from first conversation to launch and beyond.
process.s1p: We learn your business, audience, and goals. What do you offer? Who are you trying to reach? What does success look like?
process.s2p: We define the approach: site structure, key messages, lead capture points, and (if needed) how ads and landing pages fit in.
process.s3p: We design and build your website or funnel, test on mobile, and launch. You get a conversion-ready system, not a placeholder.
process.s4p: After launch we monitor, tweak, and improve. Better forms, clearer CTAs, and ongoing optimization so leads keep coming.

cases.desc: Results across paid ads, websites, and landing pages.
cases.c1d1: Drive qualified leads and conversions for a B2B client.
cases.c1d3: Decision-makers 25–44, interests in business tools and SaaS.
cases.c1d4: 3 ad formats: static, carousel, video — optimized for top performers.
cases.c2d1: Improve load speed, UX, and lead capture.
cases.c2d2: Full site audit, redesign, and migration.
cases.c2d4: Mobile-first design, faster load, clearer CTAs.
cases.c3d1: Launch conversion-focused page for a product campaign.
cases.c3d4: Hero variants, form placement, social proof.
cases.c3d5_html: 3× conversion lift vs. previous page

testimonials.desc: Results and feedback from businesses we’ve helped get more leads and grow online.
testimonials.q1: StrategyLab didn’t just build a site — they helped us think through conversion. Our inquiries went up and the site actually reflects our business.
testimonials.q2: Clear communication and a process that made sense. We got a landing page that converts and a partner we’d work with again.

final_cta.desc: Book a free consultation, chat on WhatsApp, or send your details. We’ll respond within 24 hours.

contact.lead: Short form, fast response. Tell us what you need and we’ll get back within 24 hours.
contact.intro: Prefer to write? Use the form below and we’ll reply within 24 hours.
contact.call_link: Get in touch or use the form below →
contact.svc_hint: Choose the service you are interested in.
contact.ph_goal: e.g. more inquiries, bookings, or sales
contact.success: Thanks! We'll be in touch within 24 hours.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please email us at bakorodolph@gmail.com

footer.tagline: Websites and ad funnels built for lead generation. Serving local and regional businesses. Responsive, mobile-first, conversion-oriented — with WhatsApp integration and analytics.
footer.tagline_quote: Websites and ad funnels built for lead generation.

modal.title: Project preview
modal.hint: If the preview is blank, the site may block embedding — use “Visit site” to open it in a new tab.

quote_page.meta_title: Get a Quote | StrategyLab — Website & Digital Marketing Estimate
quote_page.meta_desc: Get a quick estimate for your website, landing page, or ads project. See what’s possible within your budget and request a full quote from StrategyLab.
quote_page.h1: Get a Quick Estimate for Your Project
quote_page.intro: Use this tool to see what’s realistically possible within your budget. You’ll get an instant breakdown of recommended scope, what’s included, and optional add-ons. Final pricing may vary based on complexity, timeline, and specific requirements — we’ll confirm everything when you request a full quote.
loading: Calculating the best fit for your budget...
quote_page.trans1_html: This is an estimate, not a final invoice. Final pricing depends on scope agreed in discovery.
quote_page.trans2: Strategy, copywriting, custom integrations, large page counts, and rush delivery may affect pricing.
quote_page.trans3_html: Ad spend is separate from our management fees — you control the ad budget.
quote_page.trans4: Domain and hosting are third-party costs; we can recommend and set them up for you.
quote_page.lead_h3: Send this estimate to my inbox
quote_page.lead_desc: We’ll email your estimate and follow up to discuss your project.
quote_page.lead_success: Thanks! We’ve received your details and will send your estimate and follow up shortly.
quote_page.lead_error: Something went wrong. Please email bakorodolph@gmail.com or message us on WhatsApp.

tp.ads_note: Ad spend is separate from our fees. We typically recommend starting with a test budget (e.g. {{low}}–{{high}}+/month) and scaling based on results.

c.next_step: Request a full quote or book a free consultation so we can confirm scope and deliver a final proposal.
c.inc_ads_1: Audience targeting and ad creative direction
c.exc_ads_1: Ad spend (you set and control your ad budget separately)
c.add_ads_seo: SEO is separate from ads; we can quote it as an add-on
c.pkg_starter: Starter — Landing page or simple site
c.inc_st_0: Single landing page or very simple 1–3 page site
c.add_st_dh: Domain and hosting (see third-party costs below)
c.add_st_ads: Ads management can be added; discuss in consultation
c.inc_es_2: Clear calls to action and lead capture
c.inc_es_brand: Use of your existing branding and content
c.exc_es_0: Heavy custom functionality or large page counts
c.add_es_ads: Ads management — separate fee; we’ll quote based on scope
c.inc_gr_0: Full business or company website (up to 10–12 pages)
c.inc_gr_2: Lead capture, forms, and clear CTAs
c.exc_gr_0: Custom app or complex integrations without separate quote
c.add_gr_ads: Ads management — we’ll quote setup + monthly management
c.inc_pr_ads: Ads management setup and strategy (management fee separate from ad spend)
c.inc_pr_dh: Domain and hosting guidance and setup
c.exc_pr_0: Custom development beyond agreed scope (we’ll quote separately)
c.add_combo_ads: Ads management setup (management fee separate from ad spend)
c.redesign_audit: Audit of current site and strategy
